description_long: This is a modern, low-floor city bus with a streamlined, rectangular body painted in a deep teal color. The bus features large, tinted rectangular windows along both sides, providing ample visibility for passengers. Distinctive graphics, including a leafy branch and the slogan 'MOVE SMART' in both English and Arabic, are displayed on the sides. The front of the bus has a wide windshield, LED headlights, and a subtle grille, while the rear is more minimal with simple tail lights. The wheels are metallic with visible hubcaps, and the bus appears to have a single wide passenger door on the right side. The roof is flat with a raised section, likely for air conditioning or ventilation units.
description: A sleek, teal city bus with large tinted windows, modern graphics, and a single wide passenger door on the right side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bus, large windows, 'MOVE SMART' graphics, and leafy design.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back panel, tail lights, and a partial leafy graphic.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with windows, graphics, and the bus's rear-view mirror visible.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the wide windshield, headlights, and subtle grille.
attribute_window_arrangement: Seven large, evenly spaced rectangular windows along each side, separated by narrow vertical pillars; all windows are of similar size and shape.
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: No visible manufacturer logo; only 'MOVE SMART' branding and leafy graphics on the sides.
